about.title: Who We Are
about.description: AA SİRKO is a highly diversified and forward-thinking company committed to achieving excellence across a wide range of industries. Our expertise spans real estate development, automotive trade, transportation, and logistics, allowing us to create comprehensive solutions that drive progress and innovation. We strive to deliver exceptional value by combining knowledge, technology, and sustainable practices.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description1: Fostering continuous improvement and creative thinking.
innovation.description2: Embracing new technologies to stay ahead.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description1: Building strong partnerships for mutual success.

automotive.title: Automotive
automotive.description: Since 1955, our Automotive Division has set the benchmark for excellence.

realEstate.title: Real Estate
realEstate.description: Delivering innovative developments combining functionality and design.

transportation.title: Transportation
transportation.description: Providing efficient and reliable logistics solutions.

logistics.title: Logistics
logistics.description: Ensuring streamlined operations through end-to-end solutions.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: AA SİRKO is a dynamic and innovative company dedicated to excellence across multiple industries...

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: We provide quality products that enrich lives.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.description: We pursue excellence and put customer needs first.

services.title: Our Services
services.desc: We stand alongside individuals and families — offering guidance, resources, and community every step of the way.

1.title: Social Support
1.text: Providing emotional and practical support through guidance and community programs.

2.title: Education & Language
2.text: Training programs and language courses to improve skills and opportunities.

3.title: Legal Assistance
3.text: Legal advice and support in family, work, and housing matters.

4.title: Community Development
4.text: Building stronger communities through initiatives and projects.

5.title: Refugee Support
5.text: Helping newcomers integrate with guidance and job support.

6.title: Women & Children
6.text: Safe spaces and activities supporting well-being and development.

leadership.title: Our Leadership
leadership.subtitle: Meet the visionary leading our company.

ceo.name: Wael
ceo.description: Wael has led AA SİRKO towards corporate success and global recognition as Vice Chairman & CEO. With over three decades of experience, he has played a key role in the company's growth, navigating it through transformation and expansion.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: AA SİRKO is a highly diversified and forward-thinking company committed to achieving excellence across a wide range of industries. Our expertise spans real estate development, automotive trade, transportation, and logistics, allowing us to create comprehensive solutions that drive progress and innovation. We strive to deliver exceptional value to our clients, partners, and communities by combining industry knowledge, cutting-edge technology, and sustainable practices.

atAGlance.title: At a Glance
atAGlance.description: We are proud to drive innovation and progress in the global automotive industry. Committed to excellence, we deliver cutting-edge solutions that empower businesses and enrich communities. Explore our impact and latest advancements here.

newCars.title: New Cars
newCars.description: Our New Cars Division delivers the latest vehicles with advanced technology and design innovations.

evCharging.title: EV & Charging
evCharging.description: The EV & Charging Division leads the transition to sustainable energy with cutting-edge charging infrastructure.

usedVehicles.title: Used Vehicles
usedVehicles.description: Our Used Vehicles Division ensures top quality pre-owned cars with complete service and reliability.

rentalLeasing.title: Rental & Leasing
rentalLeasing.description: Since 1955, our Rental & Leasing Division has set industry standards in customer satisfaction across the MENA region.

motorcycles.title: Motorcycles
motorcycles.description: Our Motorcycles Division combines power, style, and performance for riders across the region.

commercialVehicles.title: Commercial Vehicles
commercialVehicles.description: The Commercial Vehicles Division offers durable and efficient transport solutions tailored for business needs.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: AAsirko Logistics & Transportations provides reliable and integrated logistics and transportation solutions across land, sea, and air. We ensure safe, on-time delivery through efficient supply chain management, modern fleet operations, and professional expertise. Our mission is to connect businesses with the world through smart, transparent, and customer-focused services.

warehousing.title: Warehousing & Inventory
features: Secure storage with advanced monitoring systems.
Real-time stock control and flexible capacity.

customsClearance.title: Customs Clearance
features: Smooth handling of import and export procedures.
Ensures compliance with all local regulations

supplyChain.title: Supply Chain Management
features: End-to-end planning and coordination of shipments.
Enhances efficiency and reduces operational costs.

distribution.title: Distribution & Delivery
features: Customized packaging to protect every product.

packaging.title: Packaging & Handling
features: Customized packaging to protect every product.

consulting.title: Logistics Consulting
features: Professional advice to optimize your logistics flow.
Helps you save time, space, and operational costs.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Discover your dream home or ideal investment with AASIRKO. We specialize in connecting buyers, sellers, and investors with the perfect properties. Whether you're looking for residential, commercial, or rental properties, our dedicated team provides expert guidance, personalized service, and in-depth market knowledge to help you make confident decisions. Explore listings, browse virtual tours, and experience a seamless real estate journey tailored just for you.

residencesCommunities.title: Residences & Communities
residencesCommunities.description: Our Superior Living Spaces Designed To Enhance Quality of Life Our residences and communities offer thoughtfully designed environments that go beyond housing, fostering a true sense of belonging.
